# Legacy Reference Placeholder

This file preserves a migrated reference link to `workflows/apply-to-feature.md` for `adp-fend-react-scaffold`.

Prefer the active `SKILL.md`, workflows, `references/guidance.md`, and bundled templates first. During the reference rewrite pass, replace this placeholder with real role-specific guidance or remove the stale link.

## Review Checklist

- Confirm the original guidance was salvaged into an active reference or workflow.
- Remove duplicate or obsolete cross-links.
- Keep AD Ports tenant, Arabic/RTL, data residency, NESA/PDPL, operational window, and audit evidence checks visible where relevant.

## Before you start

- [ ] You have the SKILL.md `## Hard rules` and `## Quality bar` in view.
- [ ] You have read the topical sections of this workflow before starting work.
- [ ] Required inputs named in the parent SKILL.md `## Inputs` are present.

## Steps

Treat each topical section above as a discrete step and apply them in document order, gated by the `## Before you start` checklist.

## Anti-patterns

- Skipping the `## Before you start` checklist.
- Diverging from the topical guidance without recording an exception.
- Marking work complete without the evidence listed in the workflow body.

## After you finish

- [ ] Each topical section above is addressed (or skipped with a recorded reason).
- [ ] Evidence committed alongside the artefact per the parent `SKILL.md` quality bar.
- [ ] Handoff routed per the `## Handoff` block above (or per `SKILL.md` if absent).
